news.t: Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate

overview.description: The Convergence Long/Short Equity ETF (CLSE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund establishes both long and short positions in US stocks. The actively managed fund intends to maintain a 50%-100% net long exposure. CLSE was launched on Dec 29, 2009 and is issued by Convergence.

data.title: Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate
data.text: Registered investment advisors did not pull back on exchange-traded funds in the first quarter of 2026. They kept adding them, according to AdvizorPro's Q1 2026 Quarterly RIA ETF Trends Report.
